都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. (Check the shop’s account for details!) ≪Shop Information≫ 【Shop Name】Shunyacchan Yatai Ramen 【Address】1277-8 Hatsuzawamachi, Hachioji, Tokyo 【Hours】18:00–23:00 【Closed】Mondays & Sundays   #japanesefood

The new Superfly 11 is WILD 🤯 what do you think? 🤔 #unisportlife #footballboots #nikefootball

Are they really back? Yes, absolutely. We exclusively tested both new Mercurial models in Madrid (thanks to @Nike Football and @hubcommnet), as always, we want to give you every possible detail to build your own opinion: visuals, product insights, but most importantly our real feedback after using them on pitch, in matches and during specific training sessions that seriously “stressed” both boots. The new Superfly sends a very clear message as soon as you put it on: innovation built to deliver maximum propulsion. That’s exactly what the forefoot “plate” gives you, an aggressive sense of push and energy return that you can genuinely feel while sprinting. Vapor changes too and the almost “strange” feeling when wearing it for the first time is actually maximum comfort. Not because Mercurial Vapor has never been comfortable, but comfort has probably never been the first thing that comes to mind when thinking about this boot. Other details you’ll definitely want to know: Vapor is the lightest Mercurial ever made at just 130g, while Superfly features a very grippy upper despite being a product fully focused on speed and sprinting. Sizing? Stay relaxed with your usual Nike size, this is 100% true to size. We have a lot more content directly filmed in Madrid coming very soon, so as always, feel free to leave your questions in the comments. There’s a lot more coming... #bootsculture #NikeMercurial #Mercurial #footballboots

Lighter and thinner than any Merc ever before! The new @Nike Football Mercurial Vapor 17 Elite no longer takes a backseat to the Superfly, with an extremely minimal, but still distinctly Mercurial execution! How do you rate them on first impressions? #nikefootball #mercurial #vapor #nike #sr4u

Drugstore Makeup Tutorial for Oily Skin type 👍🏽 Makeup tips for #oilyskin 👇🏾  - moisturize with oily control cream (oily skin is also dehydrated) - face prep with a matte setting spray and with a thin layer of powder to absorb excess oil and create a matte canvas  - use a soft matte or lumi matte foundation that is not fill coverage  - use matte setting spray BEFORE, DURING AND AFTER MAKEUP - set the face with thin layer of powder (set the blush and bronzer too) - lock in the eyelids with a blurring primer and powder (this will control oil and help mascara not smudge) @CeraVe Oil Control Moisturizing Gel  @loréal paris usa 3 second setting spray and Extentionist mascara  @Milani Cosmetics Mattefying setting spray and concealer + perfect powder  @e.l.f. Cosmetics matte magic mist and set and liquid camo bronzer  @Maybelline NY LUMI Matte foundation and Fit Me Concealer and Fit Me batter + Poreless Pressed Powder @COVERGIRL Trublend skin enhancer blush stick  @NYX Professional Makeup wonder snatch powder  #oilyskinmakeup #makeuptips #drusgtoremakeup #fullfacedrugstoremakeup

한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

The Bengal 🐆cat is a unique domestic breed known for its wild leopard-like appearance and highly active personality. Its coat features striking spotted or marbled patterns that resemble a miniature wild cat, making it one of the most visually exotic cat breeds in the world. Despite its wild look, the Bengal is fully domestic and forms strong bonds with its owner. This breed is highly intelligent, curious, and energetic. Bengals enjoy climbing, exploring, and interactive play, and they require mental stimulation to stay happy. They are social cats that can be very affectionate, but they also demand attention and an engaging environment. When properly cared for, the Bengal cat becomes a loyal, entertaining, and dynamic companion 🫶🏼 #bengalcat #bengalkitten #bengalkedisi #bengalcats #fypage

Der wahrscheinlich kleinste OP-Patient der Welt: Flusi. Ein Dsungsarischer Zwerghamster - erratet ihr sein Gewicht? Kleiner Tipp: es liegt eher im Gramm Bereich so im Kilogrammbereich. Diese OP war durchaus eine Herausforderung weil man eigentlich gar kein richtiges Monitoring (also Überwachung der Vitalparamter wie Atmung, EKG, Sauerstoffsättigung usw.) zur Verfügung hat. Das heißt man ist sehr eingeschränkt was Handlungsfähigkeit angeht. Aber Flusi hat das toll gemeistert und durfte nach kurzer Zeit wieder nach Hause entlassen werden. Solche Patienten sind natürlich eher selten - aber auch ein Zwerghamster verdient eine Chance wenn es eine gibt, oder wie seht ihr das?#CapCut
